observed_authority_claims: Python harness overwrites latest QA file
Bash harness overwrites same latest QA file (no inter-process lock)
aq-report writes separate latest report and computes scorecard
dashboard has fallback scorecard calculator (second score semantics)

projections.name: dashboard scorecard card
projections.rebuild_source: recompute from immutable QA invocation artifact (C0.2 evidence store)

ordering_revision: two clobber writers to one latest path; last-writer-wins, no revision
provenance_freshness: file mtime; report may substitute delegation for missing QA
recovery_owner: rerun/manual replacement; no immutable invocation recovery pre-C0.2
target_hypothesis: one QA artifact is invocation evidence (C0.2), pointer/dashboard are projections, declared report scorecard producer; retire _synthesize_scorecard_from_report and the second clobber writer
usage_divergence_metric: count of runs where dashboard fallback scorecard diverges from C0.2 evidence-store scorecard
notes: C0.2 producer contract: one QA artifact = invocation evidence; scorecard producer declared.
